description:
Logic for checking if a process is alive and terminating it is duplicated with OS-specific handlers across 4 locations:

- agent-runner/src/cleanup.rs:105-175 (process_exists, kill_process)
- agent-runner/src/lock.rs:105-145 (process_exists with additional is_zombie_process check on Unix)
- orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/runtime_daemon.rs:45-110 (is_process_alive, terminate_process)
- orchestrator-cli/src/services/operations/ops_runner.rs:46-95 (process_exists_cli, kill_process_cli)

Some use nix, some use std::process::Command, some use tasklist/taskkill on Windows. Solution: Consolidate into a single process management module in orchestrator-core or protocol with platform-specific implementations.
title: Consolidate process liveness and termination logic (4 implementations)
